title: scutellaria lateriflora
intro: Scutellaria lateriflora, also known as Blue Skullcap, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to North America. The plant's leaves and flowers contain flavonoids and iridoid glycosides, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria lateriflora include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Blue Skullcap can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
